creator: grog@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->grog

grog is looking at this PR 

Greg Lehey, 21 July 1999

	I have had no reply from the submitter.  In view of the
	massive changes that have occurred to the SCSI subsystem since
	it was entered, I can't believe that there is any reason to
	keep this PR open.
